scripts.build: pnpm run build:yak && pnpm run generate:letters && pnpm run build:next
scripts.build:turbo: pnpm run build:yak && pnpm run generate:letters && pnpm run build:next:turbo
scripts.generate:codspeed: pnpm run generate:codspeed:pure-components && pnpm run generate:codspeed:attrs-components && pnpm run generate:codspeed:css-prop && pnpm run generate:codspeed:dynamic-props && pnpm run generate:codspeed:nested-components
scripts.codspeed: pnpm run generate:letters && pnpm run generate:codspeed && pnpm run codspeed:build && pnpm run codspeed:run
scripts.codspeed:build: tsdown ./codspeed/index.bench.tsx --no-config --sourcemap --format esm --target node20 --out-dir ./codspeed/dist --deps.neverBundle benchmark --deps.neverBundle react --deps.neverBundle next-yak --deps.neverBundle styled-components --deps.neverBundle react-dom --deps.neverBundle @codspeed/benchmark.js-plugin
